text: Apart from Chen, Jang and Chang (2013) and Jang, Wang and Chen (2012) works, the impact of international co-invention on total patent and knowledge spillover to emerging economies has been focused on the total number of inventions in emerging economies, which has overlooked the fact that the contributions of foreign inventors to emerging economies might differ greatly from time to time.
